comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
@fatherlinux looks like you neglected to sign the commit.   Can you add iptables too please (and to keep my ocd happy, alphabetize the packages) and then do 'git commit --amend -s' and push it again.

I did the doc change in the web interface. I wasn't sure how to get it 
back, so I just deleted and submitted a new PR :-)


On 02/15/2018 09:21 AM, Tom Sweeney wrote:
>
> @fatherlinux <https://github.com/fatherlinux> looks like you neglected 
> to sign the commit. Can you add iptables too please (and to keep my 
> ocd happy, alphabetize the packages) and then do 'git commit --amend 
> -s' and push it again.
>
> —

Scott McCarty

scott.mccarty@gmail.com

@fatherlinux
We need to make sure atomic-registries is added as a requirement in the podman spec for Fedora as well.

Ok I see it is already there.
Lets get some update on karma so we can cut a new release of podman.
